name: content-columns
title: Content Columns
description: A two-column content section pairing a heading with body copy and a CTA, installed as a wired Payload block.

preview.summary: Heading on the left, body paragraphs and a CTA on the right.

sampleContent.title: The ecosystem brings together your models, products and platforms.

paragraphs.text: Payload is more than just the CMS. It supports an entire ecosystem — from the products you ship to the APIs and platforms helping your team move faster.
Pair the headline on the left with the detail on the right: a layout that reads top-to-bottom on mobile and side-by-side on desktop.
